'''shonajaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:nrml|nrml]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-n-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nrml|nrml]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| shonajaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shonajithi|shonajithi]] || [[word:shonajiji|shonajiji]] || [[word:shonajishi|shonajishi]] || [[word:shonajiki|shonajiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shonajuthuthu|shonajuthuthu]] || [[word:shonajujuju|shonajujuju]] || [[word:shonajushushu|shonajushushu]] || [[word:shonajukuku|shonajukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shonajuthu|shonajuthu]] || [[word:shonajuju|shonajuju]] || [[word:shonajushu|shonajushu]] || [[word:shonajuku|shonajuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shonajufthuf|shonajufthuf]] || [[word:shonajufjuf|shonajufjuf]] || [[word:shonajufshuf|shonajufshuf]] || [[word:shonajufkuf|shonajufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shonajethe|shonajethe]] || [[word:shonajeje|shonajeje]] || [[word:shonajeshe|shonajeshe]] || [[word:shonajeke|shonajeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shonajothotho|shonajothotho]] || [[word:shonajojojo|shonajojojo]] || [[word:shonajoshosho|shonajoshosho]] || [[word:shonajokoko|shonajokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shonajotho|shonajotho]] || [[word:shonajojo|shonajojo]] || [[word:shonajosho|shonajosho]] || [[word:shonajoko|shonajoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shonajofthof|shonajofthof]] || [[word:shonajofjof|shonajofjof]] || [[word:shonajofshof|shonajofshof]] || [[word:shonajofkof|shonajofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:shonajĂŻfthĂŻf|shonajĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shonajĂŻfjĂŻf|shonajĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shonajĂŻfshĂŻf|shonajĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shonajĂŻfkĂŻf|shonajĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:shonajĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|shonajĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shonajĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|shonajĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shonajĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|shonajĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shonajĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|shonajĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:shonajĂŻfthĂŻf|shonajĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shonajĂŻfjĂŻf|shonajĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shonajĂŻfshĂŻf|shonajĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shonajĂŻfkĂŻf|shonajĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:shonajĂŻfthĂŻf|shonajĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shonajĂŻfjĂŻf|shonajĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shonajĂŻfshĂŻf|shonajĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shonajĂŻfkĂŻf|shonajĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shonajĂŠthĂŠ|shonajĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:shonajĂŠjĂŠ|shonajĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:shonajĂŠshĂŠ|shonajĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:shonajĂŠkĂŠ|shonajĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shonajathatha|shonajathatha]] || [[word:shonajajaja|shonajajaja]] || [[word:shonajashasha|shonajashasha]] || [[word:shonajakaka|shonajakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shonajatha|shonajatha]] || [[word:shonajaja|shonajaja]] || [[word:shonajasha|shonajasha]] || [[word:shonajaka|shonajaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shonajafthaf|shonajafthaf]] || [[word:shonajafjaf|shonajafjaf]] || [[word:shonajafshaf|shonajafshaf]] || [[word:shonajafkaf|shonajafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:shonajasha|shonajasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:shonajshĂ«sha|shonajshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shonajrosha|shonajrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shonajmusha|shonajmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:shonajyasha|shonajyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshonajnkshĂ«sha|goshonajnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshonajnkrosha|goshonajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshonajnkmusha|goshonajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshonajnkyasha|goshonajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:shonanajasha|shonanajasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shonanajshĂ«sha|shonanajshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shonanajrosha|shonanajrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shonanajmusha|shonanajmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shonanajyasha|shonanajyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshonanajnkshĂ«sha|goshonanajnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshonanajnkrosha|goshonanajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshonanajnkmusha|goshonanajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshonanajnkyasha|goshonanajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:shenĂŠjasha|shenĂŠjasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shenĂŠjshĂ«sha|shenĂŠjshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shenĂŠjrosha|shenĂŠjrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shenĂŠjmusha|shenĂŠjmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shenĂŠjyasha|shenĂŠjyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshenĂŠjnkshĂ«sha|goshenĂŠjnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshenĂŠjnkrosha|goshenĂŠjnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshenĂŠjnkmusha|goshenĂŠjnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshenĂŠjnkyasha|goshenĂŠjnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:shonfajasha|shonfajasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shonfajshĂ«sha|shonfajshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shonfajrosha|shonfajrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shonfajmusha|shonfajmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shonfajyasha|shonfajyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshonfajnkshĂ«sha|goshonfajnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshonfajnkrosha|goshonfajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshonfajnkmusha|goshonfajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshonfajnkyasha|goshonfajnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
